passport.title: Passport scan
bullets: Capture the full photo page with all four corners visible
Avoid glare, shadows, and blurry text
Ensure your passport is valid for at least 6 months

photo.title: Passport photo
bullets: Use a recent photo on a plain white background
Face the camera directly with eyes open
No hats, sunglasses, or heavy filters

itinerary.title: Travel itinerary
bullets: Include flight bookings and accommodation details
PDF or clear screenshot is accepted
Dates should match your planned travel

invitation.title: Invitation letter
bullets: Upload a signed letter from your host or business partner
Include contact details and travel dates

default.title: Document upload
bullets: Upload a clear JPG, PNG, or PDF file
Make sure all text is readable
